title: At the café
explanation:
At the café

Listen to a customer ordering at a café.

Transcript

Waiter: Good morning. What would you like?
Customer: Can I have a coffee, please?
Waiter: Of course. Anything else?
Customer: Yes, a cheese sandwich, please.
Waiter: OK. That's three pounds fifty.
Customer: Here you are. Thank you.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.feedback: Can I have a coffee, please?

questions.text: The waiter says [*Good morning|Good night|Goodbye] first.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen again and choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The customer says: 'Can I ____ a coffee?' | *have | make | go
The sandwich is ____ sandwich. | *cheese | coffee | morning
The customer says ____ you are when paying. | *Here | There | How
The customer says ____ at the end. | *Thank you | Please | Sorry

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The conversation takes place in a [*café|shop|school].
The waiter asks if the customer wants [*anything else|to leave|help].
